history.title: Marcus' Folly Appears
history.text: A whirlpool forms in the sky; almost furiously distorting space where it arrives; casting darkness below like a particularly thick cloud. It is shortly known as Marcus' Folly.

wonders.name: The Sing-Ling Stone
wonders.description: The great red granite arch that has holes drilled through, when the wind passes through these carved holes the stone Sings back to the Lings, seeming to respond to their own Ling’uage. It is located over a small pond that the Lings use for fertility rituals.

wonders.name: Alberocoronanuvole
wonders.description: In their obscure forest, a massive tree - one which ‘crowns the clouds’ - enables I Druidi to keep an eye on their native archipelago, the southern landmass, and the mainland coastline. All Elfi can and do gaze back at their wonder with pride and awe, but outsiders it fills with unease at best.

wonders.name: Half-Home
wonders.description: The first halfling Settlement, a great Halfling Mound built within the plains, said to house unknown halflings families, and surrounded by great fields of Grain. It is not pretty by any means but to the nomadic tribes of the world it is a marvel of this Age.
